description: You are an ecologist returning from a field survey at the Blackwood Wetland Reserve. Format the survey report located at /home/ga/Documents/blackwood_wetland_survey.odt according to the DEP guidelines provided at /home/ga/Desktop/dep_report_guidelines.txt. Apply Heading 1 styles to the five main sections and Heading 2 styles to the four subsections. Insert a Table of Contents immediately following the Introduction. Italicize all instances of the six scientific Latin names listed in the guidelines and convert the comma-separated observation data at the end of the document into a structured four-column table. Save the document when complete.
